agent-consumer-experience.name: agent-consumer-experience
agent-consumer-experience.description: Help users design products for end-user personal agents — mapping how consumer AI assistants interact with your product on behalf of humans — producing agent interaction models, consent frameworks, preference APIs, and agent-mediated UX patterns.
expected_artifacts: Consent and Delegation Framework with tier definitions and configuration specification

required_sections: Consent and Delegation Framework with tier definitions and configuration specification

agent-integration-design.name: agent-integration-design
agent-integration-design.description: Help users design their product's integration surface for agent-driven workflows — producing I/O specifications, webhook designs, event stream architecture, and orchestration compatibility assessment.

agent-journey-mapping.name: agent-journey-mapping
agent-journey-mapping.description: Help users design agent journeys — mapping how AI agents discover, authenticate, use, and recover from errors with a product — producing journey maps, I/O contracts, failure mode analysis, and agent experience optimization roadmap.

agent-ready-gtm.name: agent-ready-gtm
agent-ready-gtm.description: Help users design go-to-market strategies for agent-mediated buying — producing an agent buyer journey map, machine-readable trust center, pricing API design, and agent-ready GTM playbook.
expected_artifacts: Agent Buyer Journey Map with readiness assessment
Pricing API Specification with endpoint designs, response schemas, and example responses

required_sections: Agent Buyer Journey Map with readiness assessment
Pricing API Specification with endpoint designs, response schemas, and example responses

agent-surface-audit.name: agent-surface-audit
agent-surface-audit.description: Help users audit whether their product is discoverable and usable by AI agents — producing an agent accessibility scorecard, surface area inventory, machine-readability assessment, and prioritized remediation roadmap.
expected_artifacts: Agent Accessibility Scorecard with overall grade

required_sections: Agent Accessibility Scorecard with overall grade

api-design-review.name: api-design-review
api-design-review.description: Help users review an API's design quality by assessing endpoints against REST conventions, consistency standards, and developer ergonomics — producing a per-endpoint scorecard, naming audit, error handling review, and prioritized recommendations.

competitive-response.name: competitive-response
competitive-response.description: Help users analyze competitive threats, classify their severity, design response strategies, and identify sustainable moats.

customer-discovery.name: customer-discovery
customer-discovery.description: Help users plan and execute customer discovery — producing interview guides, recruitment strategies, synthesis frameworks, and discovery reports with validated/invalidated hypotheses.

developer-experience-audit.name: developer-experience-audit
developer-experience-audit.description: Help users audit the developer experience of an API or developer product — producing a friction scorecard, time-to-hello-world analysis, documentation quality assessment, and prioritized DX improvement roadmap.

ecosystem-health.name: ecosystem-health
ecosystem-health.description: Help users assess their platform ecosystem's health by scoring community engagement, developer adoption velocity, third-party integrations, and identifying growth levers.

experiment-design.name: experiment-design
experiment-design.description: Help users design and run product experiments — producing experiment briefs, statistical plans, growth loop designs, and results synthesis to systematically convert hypotheses into validated knowledge.

feature-prioritization.name: feature-prioritization
feature-prioritization.description: Help users prioritize features using a weighted scoring matrix, RICE framework adaptation, and sequencing analysis to produce a ranked backlog, trade-off documentation, and a sequenced roadmap.
expected_artifacts: Scoring Criteria Table with definitions, scales, and agreed-upon weights

required_sections: Scoring Criteria Table with definitions, scales, and agreed-upon weights

iteration-cadence-design.name: iteration-cadence-design
iteration-cadence-design.description: Help users design their team's operating rhythm — producing cadence architectures, weekly PM calendars, ritual designs, decision rhythms, and adaptation triggers that replace rigid quarterly planning with shorter, learning-oriented cycles.

mcp-design-review.name: mcp-design-review
mcp-design-review.description: Help users review an MCP server's design quality by assessing tool naming, descriptions, schemas, permission model, and error surfaces — producing a per-tool scorecard, security audit, and prioritized recommendations.

measuring-product-market-fit.name: measuring-product-market-fit
measuring-product-market-fit.description: Help users measure product-market fit for new-category products by building a PMF scorecard, tracking leading signals, and making pivot/persevere decisions.

north-star-metrics.name: north-star-metrics
north-star-metrics.description: Help users define their North Star Metric, build a metric tree of leading and lagging indicators, design a metrics dashboard, and establish a measurement cadence.
expected_artifacts: A one-paragraph value exchange statement and identification of the core action
North Star Metric definition with name, formula, measurement frequency, and counter-metric
A baselines and targets table with columns: Metric | Baseline | 30-Day Target | 90-Day Target | 12-Month Aspiration | Investigate Threshold
A dashboard specification document with layout, data sources, refresh cadences, alert conditions, and a weekly snapshot template
A measurement cadence document with meeting formats, agendas, attendees

required_sections: A one-paragraph value exchange statement and identification of the core action
North Star Metric definition with name, formula, measurement frequency, and counter-metric
A baselines and targets table with columns: Metric | Baseline | 30-Day Target | 90-Day Target | 12-Month Aspiration | Investigate Threshold
A dashboard specification document with layout, data sources, refresh cadences, alert conditions, and a weekly snapshot template
A measurement cadence document with meeting formats, agendas, attendees

partnership-evaluation.name: partnership-evaluation
partnership-evaluation.description: Help users evaluate potential partnerships by scoring strategic fit, modeling deal structures, and producing comparative assessments with go/no-go recommendations.

platform-vs-application.name: platform-vs-application
platform-vs-application.description: Help users decide whether to build a platform, an application, or a hybrid by analyzing ecosystem dynamics, developer economics, and strategic positioning.
expected_artifacts: Value Chain Map with control point annotations

required_sections: Value Chain Map with control point annotations

pricing-and-monetization.name: pricing-and-monetization
pricing-and-monetization.description: Help users design pricing models and monetization strategy by analyzing willingness-to-pay, competitive positioning, and packaging to maximize revenue and adoption.
expected_artifacts: A Value Architecture document with the core value metric, value chain map, and per-segment value benchmarks,
A Willingness-to-Pay report with price boundaries per segment, competitive price map, and recommended price range,
A Pricing Model Design document specifying the model type, value metric, rate card, tier boundaries, and spending control mechanisms
A Tier Design Matrix with persona mapping, feature allocation, upgrade triggers, and price points for each tier
A Revenue Model spreadsheet or document with three scenarios, sensitivity analysis, and key assumptions documented
A Pricing Experimentation Roadmap with a sequenced list of experiments, hypotheses, and decision criteria,

required_sections: A Value Architecture document with the core value metric, value chain map, and per-segment value benchmarks,
A Willingness-to-Pay report with price boundaries per segment, competitive price map, and recommended price range,
A Pricing Model Design document specifying the model type, value metric, rate card, tier boundaries, and spending control mechanisms
A Tier Design Matrix with persona mapping, feature allocation, upgrade triggers, and price points for each tier
A Revenue Model spreadsheet or document with three scenarios, sensitivity analysis, and key assumptions documented
A Pricing Experimentation Roadmap with a sequenced list of experiments, hypotheses, and decision criteria,

product-narrative-strategy.name: product-narrative-strategy
product-narrative-strategy.description: Help users craft compelling product narratives — producing vision documents, strategy narratives, roadmap stories, and customer context briefs that align teams around a shared story of where the product is going and why.

product-portfolio-strategy.name: product-portfolio-strategy
product-portfolio-strategy.description: Help users define and prioritize a multi-product portfolio by mapping product surfaces, allocating resources across bets, and designing a sequenced roadmap.

product-quality-review.name: product-quality-review
product-quality-review.description: Help users evaluate product quality and craft — producing quality scorecards, taste gap analyses, competitive craft comparisons, and quality improvement roadmaps that distinguish products worth building well from products merely built correctly.

prototype-driven-validation.name: prototype-driven-validation
prototype-driven-validation.description: Help users replace PRD-first workflows with prototype-first validation — producing prototype briefs, variation matrices, customer test plans, feedback synthesis, and build/kill decisions grounded in real user reactions to tangible artifacts.

research-to-product-pipeline.name: research-to-product-pipeline
research-to-product-pipeline.description: Help users translate research breakthroughs into shipped products by evaluating readiness, designing productization paths, and managing the research-to-product handoff.

stakeholder-alignment.name: stakeholder-alignment
stakeholder-alignment.description: Help users align cross-functional stakeholders by producing stakeholder maps, RACI matrices, communication plans, decision-making frameworks, and research-product interface designs.

user-onboarding-optimization.name: user-onboarding-optimization
user-onboarding-optimization.description: Help users audit and optimize their product's onboarding flow by mapping the user journey, measuring time-to-value, defining activation metrics, identifying friction points, and producing an improvement roadmap.
expected_artifacts: Onboarding Funnel Map -- a step-by-step table documenting the current new-user journey with estimated time and drop-off risk per step
Time-to-Value Measurement -- a table with current TTV, target TTV, and the gap for each measurement dimension
Activation Metric Definition -- a specification of the activation action, time window, current rate, target rate, and retention correlation
Friction Map -- a scored table of every friction point in the onboarding flow, classified by type and severity
Experiment Backlog -- a prioritized table of 5 onboarding experiments with hypotheses, success metrics, and ICE scores
Onboarding Improvement Roadmap -- a phased plan with experiments, timelines, resource requirements, and success criteria,
Onboarding Audit Report -- the complete compiled document,

required_sections: Onboarding Funnel Map -- a step-by-step table documenting the current new-user journey with estimated time and drop-off risk per step
Time-to-Value Measurement -- a table with current TTV, target TTV, and the gap for each measurement dimension
Activation Metric Definition -- a specification of the activation action, time window, current rate, target rate, and retention correlation
Friction Map -- a scored table of every friction point in the onboarding flow, classified by type and severity
Experiment Backlog -- a prioritized table of 5 onboarding experiments with hypotheses, success metrics, and ICE scores
Onboarding Improvement Roadmap -- a phased plan with experiments, timelines, resource requirements, and success criteria,
Onboarding Audit Report -- the complete compiled document,

user-segmentation.name: user-segmentation
user-segmentation.description: Help users define, profile, and prioritize user segments -- producing segment profiles, a prioritization matrix, and cross-segment insights that inform product strategy.
expected_artifacts: Candidate segment list with a name, one-sentence description, and originating lens
A complete Segment Profile document with one filled template per candidate segment
Product Strategy Input Document containing HXC definition, onboarding critical paths, feature priorities by segment, and segment-specific metric definitions

required_sections: Candidate segment list with a name, one-sentence description, and originating lens
A complete Segment Profile document with one filled template per candidate segment
Product Strategy Input Document containing HXC definition, onboarding critical paths, feature priorities by segment, and segment-specific metric definitions

vertical-market-assessment.name: vertical-market-assessment
vertical-market-assessment.description: Help users evaluate and prioritize target verticals by sizing markets, scoring attractiveness, and designing entry strategies with go-to-market sequencing.
expected_artifacts: Beachhead Selection Memo and Bowling Alley Sequence Diagram
Entry Strategy Brief for each selected vertical
Go-to-Market Sequencing Timeline with gate criteria

required_sections: Beachhead Selection Memo and Bowling Alley Sequence Diagram
Entry Strategy Brief for each selected vertical
Go-to-Market Sequencing Timeline with gate criteria

writing-prds-for-ai.name: writing-prds-for-ai
writing-prds-for-ai.description: Help users write PRDs for AI/ML-powered products that handle model uncertainty, define evaluation criteria instead of deterministic specs, bridge the research-to-product gap, and specify behavior for probabilistic outputs.

zero-to-one-product-launch.name: zero-to-one-product-launch
zero-to-one-product-launch.description: Help users plan and execute a 0-to-1 product launch with a launch checklist, channel strategy, success metrics, and rollback plan.

improve.name: improve
improve.description: Reflect on a completed skill run, score its effectiveness, and propose one concrete improvement.

learn.name: learn
learn.description: Ingest external PM content (articles, podcasts, transcripts) and propose targeted improvements to existing skills.
